novel_features.name: Compound write from SQL predicate
novel_features.description: Resolve open positions via SQL predicate against the local mirror, then bulk-close in one round trip with one safety hash. Powers the hero command.

novel_features.name: Local SQLite mirror of MT5 state
novel_features.description: Symbols, ticks, bars (per timeframe), orders, deals, positions, calendar, features, backtests mirrored to ~/.local/share/mt5-pp-cli/store.db. Microsecond reads instead of 50ms bridge round-trips.

novel_features.name: Defense-in-depth safety layer
novel_features.description: Every write requires MT5_LIVE=1 env AND --i-understand-this-is-live flag AND --confirm <sha256> hash within 60s. Kill switch file, max volume per order, max daily loss all enforced before the bridge sees the request.

novel_features.name: Tick-accurate replay engine
novel_features.description: Stream historical bars/ticks from the local mirror to stdout JSONL. Pipe into a strategy script for offline development.

novel_features.name: Quant export to parquet/csv/jsonl
novel_features.description: Bulk export bars and ticks across symbol filters and date ranges, reading from the local mirror — never touches the bridge.

sibling_clis.name: pp-mt5-backtester
sibling_clis.purpose: Headless terminal64.exe + .ini strategy-tester runs. Different transport, no overlap.
